# imgcli full filter reference

> Complete filter catalogue for agents and scripts that need to decide whether imgcli can perform an image operation without having the binary installed.

This file extends [llms.txt](llms.txt). Start there for install notes, key commands, JSON contract, MCP links, and security context.
Generated with `make llms-full` from `imgcli -filters --json`.

## Filters

| Name | Syntax | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `scale` | `scale=W:H[:nearest\|bilinear\|bicubic\|lanczos]` | -1 keeps aspect; bicubic/lanczos = HQ |
| `crop` | `crop=W:H[:X:Y]` | default centred |
| `pad` | `pad=W:H[:X:Y[:color]]` | letterbox onto a canvas |
| `pixelate` | `pixelate=SIZE` | average SIZE×SIZE blocks |
| `hflip` | `hflip` | mirror horizontally |
| `vflip` | `vflip` | mirror vertically |
| `transpose` | `transpose=90\|180\|270` | 90-degree rotations |
| `rotate` | `rotate=DEG[:color]` | arbitrary angle, expands |
| `grayscale` | `grayscale` | luma desaturate |
| `gray` | `gray` | alias of grayscale |
| `invert` | `invert` | photographic negative |
| `negate` | `negate` | alias of invert |
| `sepia` | `sepia` | warm vintage tone |
| `brightness` | `brightness=V` | add V*255, V in -1..1 |
| `temperature` | `temperature=V` | warm(+)/cool(-), V in -1..1 |
| `temp` | `temp=V` | alias of temperature |
| `contrast` | `contrast=V` | 1=none, >1 punchier |
| `saturation` | `saturation=V` | 0=gray, 1=none, >1 vivid |
| `gamma` | `gamma=V` | >1 brightens midtones |
| `hue` | `hue=DEG` | rotate colour wheel |
| `threshold` | `threshold=V` | binarise on luma (0..255) |
| `opacity` | `opacity=V` | scale alpha, V in 0..1 |
| `tint` | `tint=color` | multiply by a colour |
| `blur` | `blur=R` | box blur, radius R |
| `gblur` | `gblur=SIGMA` | gaussian blur |
| `sharpen` | `sharpen[=AMOUNT]` | unsharp 3x3 |
| `edge` | `edge` | sobel edge detect |
| `emboss` | `emboss` | 3x3 emboss |
| `convolution` | `convolution=K[:DIV:BIAS]` | custom NxN kernel |
| `overlay` | `overlay=X:Y[:INDEX]` | alpha-composite an input |
| `fill` | `fill=color` | flood the whole frame |
| `drawbox` | `drawbox=X:Y:W:H:color[:fill\|thickness]` | rectangle |
